en: And they brought in the ark of God and set it inside the tent that David had pitched for it, and they offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.
zh: 他們把 神的約櫃抬了進去，安放在大衛為它所搭的會幕中間，然後在 神面前獻上了燔祭和平安祭。

en: And when David had finished offering the burnt offerings and the peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the LORD
zh: 大衛獻上了燔祭和平安祭以後，就奉耶和華的名給人民祝福。

en: and distributed to all Israel, both men and women, to each a loaf of bread, a portion of meat, and a cake of raisins.
zh: 他又分給以色列眾人，無論男女，每人一個餅、一塊肉、一個葡萄餅。

en: Then he appointed some of the Levites as ministers before the ark of the LORD, to invoke, to thank, and to praise the LORD, the God of Israel.
zh: 大衛派了一部分利未人，在耶和華的約櫃前事奉、頌揚、稱謝和讚美耶和華以色列的 神。

en: Asaph was the chief, and second to him were Zechariah, Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed-edom, and Jeiel, who were to play harps and lyres; Asaph was to sound the cymbals,
zh: 領導的人是亞薩，其次是撒迦利雅、耶利、示米拉末、耶歇、瑪他提雅、以利押、比拿雅、俄別．以東和耶利，他們鼓瑟彈琴，亞薩敲打響鈸。

en: and Benaiah and Jahaziel the priests were to blow trumpets regularly before the ark of the covenant of God.
zh: 比拿雅和雅哈悉兩位祭司在 神的約櫃前不住地吹號。

en: Then on that day David first appointed that thanksgiving be sung to the LORD by Asaph and his brothers.
zh: 那一天，大衛初次指定亞薩和他的親族，以詩歌稱謝耶和華，說：

en: Oh give thanks to the LORD; call upon his name; make known his deeds among the peoples!
zh: “你們要稱謝耶和華，呼求他的名， 在萬民中宣揚他的作為。

en: Sing to him; sing praises to him; tell of all his wondrous works!
zh: 要向他歌唱，向他頌揚， 述說他一切奇妙的作為。

en: Glory in his holy name; let the hearts of those who seek the LORD rejoice!
zh: 要以他的聖名為榮， 願尋求耶和華的人，心中喜樂。

en: Seek the LORD and his strength; seek his presence continually!
zh: 要尋求耶和華和他的能力， 常常尋求他的面。

en: Remember the wondrous works that he has done, his miracles and the judgments he uttered,
zh: 他的僕人以色列的後裔啊， 他所揀選的雅各的子孫啊， 你們要記念他奇妙的作為、他的奇事和他口中的判語。

en: O offspring of Israel his servant, sons of Jacob, his chosen ones!
He is the LORD our God; his judgments are in all the earth.
zh: 他是耶和華我們的 神， 他的判語達到全地。

en: Remember his covenant forever, the word that he commanded, for a thousand generations,
zh: 你們要記念他的約，直到永遠； 不可忘記他吩咐的話，直到千代。

en: the covenant that he made with Abraham, his sworn promise to Isaac,
zh: 就是他與亞伯拉罕所立的約， 他向以撒所起的誓。

en: which he confirmed as a statute to Jacob, as an everlasting covenant to Israel,
zh: 他把這約向雅各定為律例， 向以色列定為永約，

en: saying, "To you I will give the land of Canaan, as your portion for an inheritance."
zh: 說：‘我必把迦南地賜給你， 作你們的產業的分。

en: When you were few in number, and of little account, and sojourners in it,
zh: 那時你們人丁單薄，數目很少， 又是在那地作寄居的。’

en: wandering from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people,
zh: 他們從這國走到那國， 從一族走到另一族。

en: he allowed no one to oppress them; he rebuked kings on their account,
zh: 耶和華不容許任何人欺壓他們， 曾為了他們的緣故責備君王，

en: saying, "Touch not my anointed ones, do my prophets no harm!"
zh: 說：‘不可傷害我所膏的人， 不可惡待我的先知。’

en: Sing to the LORD, all the earth! Tell of his salvation from day to day.
zh: 全地都要向耶和華歌唱， 天天傳揚他的救恩。

en: Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous works among all the peoples!
zh: 在列國中述說他的榮耀， 在萬民中述說他奇妙的作為。

en: For great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised, and he is to be held in awe above all gods.
zh: 因為耶和華是偉大的，當受極大的讚美； 他當受敬畏，遠在萬神之上。

en: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, but the LORD made the heavens.
zh: 萬民的偶像算不得甚麼， 唯獨耶和華創造諸天。

en: Splendor and majesty are before him; strength and joy are in his place.
zh: 尊榮和威嚴在他面前， 能力和歡樂在他的聖所。

en: Ascribe to the LORD, O clans of the peoples, ascribe to the LORD glory and strength!
zh: 萬族萬民啊，你們要歸給耶和華， 要把榮耀和能力歸給耶和華。

en: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his name; bring an offering and come before him! Worship the LORD in the splendor of holiness;
zh: 要把耶和華的名應得的榮耀歸給他， 拿著禮物到他面前來， 要以聖潔的裝飾敬拜耶和華。

en: tremble before him, all the earth; yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved.
zh: 全地要在他面前戰慄； 他使世界堅定，不致搖動。

en: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice, and let them say among the nations, "The LORD reigns!"
zh: 願天歡喜，願地歡呼， 願人在萬國中說：‘耶和華作王了！’

en: Let the sea roar, and all that fills it; let the field exult, and everything in it!
zh: 願海和充滿海中的都澎湃， 願田和田中的一切都歡欣。

en: Then shall the trees of the forest sing for joy before the LORD, for he comes to judge the earth.
zh: 那時樹林中的樹木， 必在耶和華面前歡呼， 因為他來要審判全地。

en: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good; for his steadfast love endures forever!
zh: 你們要稱謝耶和華，因他是良善的， 他的慈愛永遠常存。

en: Say also: "Save us, O God of our salvation, and gather and deliver us from among the nations, that we may give thanks to your holy name, and glory in your praise.
zh: 你們要說：‘拯救我們的 神啊，求你拯救我們， 招聚我們，從萬國中救我們出來， 好使我們稱謝你的聖名， 以讚美你為誇耀。’

en: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting!" Then all the people said, "Amen!" and praised the LORD.
zh: 耶和華以色列的 神是應當稱頌的， 從永遠直到永遠。” 全體人民都說阿們，並且讚美耶和華。

en: So David left Asaph and his brothers there before the ark of the covenant of the LORD to minister regularly before the ark as each day required,
zh: 於是在那裡，就是耶和華的約櫃前，大衛留下亞薩和他的親族，照著每日的本分，在約櫃前不斷地事奉。

en: and also Obed-edom and his sixty-eight brothers, while Obed-edom, the son of Jeduthun, and Hosah were to be gatekeepers.
zh: 又留下俄別．以東和他們的親族六十八人，以及耶杜頓的兒子俄別．以東和何薩作守門的。

en: And he left Zadok the priest and his brothers the priests before the tabernacle of the LORD in the high place that was at Gibeon
zh: 又留下撒督祭司和他的親族，都是作祭司的。在基遍的高地耶和華的帳幕前，

en: to offer burnt offerings to the LORD on the altar of burnt offering regularly morning and evening, to do all that is written in the Law of the LORD that he commanded Israel.
zh: 每日早晚不住地在燔祭壇上，把燔祭獻給耶和華，全是照著耶和華吩咐以色列人的律法書上所寫的。

en: With them were Heman and Jeduthun and the rest of those chosen and expressly named to give thanks to the LORD, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 和他們一起的有希幔、耶杜頓和其餘被選出，有記名的人，都稱謝耶和華，因為他的慈愛永遠常存。

en: Heman and Jeduthun had trumpets and cymbals for the music and instruments for sacred song. The sons of Jeduthun were appointed to the gate.
zh: 希幔、耶杜頓和他們一起吹號敲鈸，以及演奏各種樂器，大聲歌頌 神。耶杜頓的子孫負責守門。

en: Then all the people departed each to his house, and David went home to bless his household.
zh: 於是眾民都回去，各人回自己的家；大衛也回去給自己的家人祝福。
